scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=backend & npm run dev --workspace=frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.build:staging: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build:staging --workspace=backend
scripts.build:production: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build:production --workspace=backend
scripts.deploy: npm run build:production && npm run deploy:production --workspace=backend
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build:staging && npm run deploy:staging --workspace=backend
scripts.deploy:production: npm run build:production && npm run deploy:production --workspace=backend
